description: A paper with a known ORCID-author. Author-publication discovery (E35-T02) must propose the author's topically-related work for review and reject an unrelated work as out of scope, while never asserting official publisher authority and never re-proposing the seed paper itself.
expected_behavior: The related publication (title shares terms with the analyzed paper) is retained as primary_non_official with recommended_action review and an exact orcid_exact identity match; an unrelated work with zero topical overlap is rejected as out_of_scope. The seed paper is never proposed. Identity is exact (ORCID), so no identity_inferred flag is raised.

paper.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks

works.display_name: Marine Biology of Pacific Coral Reefs
